An equation solved with a single inverse: 用一个反向操作解析的方程式
Operations that undo each other: additio: 相互拆分的操作: 加“减法,乘法”分隔
An equation requiring two inverse operat: 需要两个反向操作才能解答的方程式
What is the order of steps for a two-ste: 两步方程的阶梯顺序是多少?
Undo addition/subtraction first, then un: 先取消添加/减减号,然后取消乘数/除法
Why should you check your solution?: 你为什么要检查你的解决方案?
To verify it satisfies the original equa: 核查是否符合原来方程式
